planPrerequisites.description: akita-write must consume the persisted approved plan and scenario capability matrix from disk before it decides what the supported subset can materialize.

requiredMachineState.description: Canonical emitted artifact set for the supported subset only, using repo-relative target paths.
Inspectable lineage from each generated artifact back to the approved plan and the manifest-listed capability bundles used to justify it.
Write verdict, omissions, ownership blocks, and explicit stop reasons for anything the writer could not materialize.

ownership.description: akita-write may update the pack-managed write state paths above and may create new repo artifacts only at approved-plan canonical targets. It must not overwrite non-pack-managed files or publish outside those canonical destinations.

provenanceRequirements.description: Provenance must tie the generated artifact set to the approved plan snapshot and the shipped capability bundle truth used during generation.

generationReport.description: The generation report is the durable inspection surface for supported-subset omissions, ownership refusals, and explicit stop conditions.

stopConditions.description: The approved plan snapshot is missing, so generation cannot choose canonical targets safely.
The scenario capability matrix is missing, so the writer cannot prove support coverage before materializing artifacts.
A manifest-listed capability bundle asset is missing, so the writer must stop instead of inventing unsupported behavior.
Requested outputs that are unsupported or only partially supported stay out of the generated artifact set and are recorded with explicit reasons.
A target path is not clearly new or pack-managed, so the writer must refuse it instead of overwriting ambiguous ownership.
A requested output path falls outside the approved-plan canonical destinations, so generation must block it explicitly.

summaryState.description: Human-readable write summary only. Canonical machine state stays in the JSON files above.

allowedSharedData: capability bundle ids and module pins
